productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Hearts Purple Flip Flops
description: Printed hearts on the insole captures the whimsical mood of the moment with these colour-happy flip flops for girls from adidas. Pair them with a similar toned tee and fitted denims or capris. Upper Rubber thong straps with the adidas patented 3-Stripes Rubber toe separator PU footbed with print for all-day massage feel Outsole TPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum traction shoe care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not machine wash
